---
title: "3D Plot Widget"
---

## Overview

Developer documentation for `ThreeDPlotWidget`, which displays 3D visualizations of data.

## Source Location

`src/WhiskerToolbox/Plots/3DPlot/`

## Architecture

*TODO: Document widget architecture, state management, and key classes.*

## Key Classes

- `ThreeDPlotWidget` — Main widget class

## See Also

- [Plot Widget Guide](../plot_widget_guide.md)
